mnemonics.title: Algorithm Order
mnemonics.content: Dijkstra Before Floyd (DBF) - Dijkstra for single-source, Bellman-Ford for negative weights, Floyd-Warshall for all-pairs

mnemonics.title: Complexity Recall
mnemonics.content: Dijkstra's Heap: VElogV, Bellman's Ford: VEE, Floyd's Cube: V³

acronyms.usage: Remember key components: Source initialization, Path relaxation, Final verification

visualTips.visualization: Imagine rubber bands contracting when shorter path found
3D matrix where each layer represents intermediate nodes

analogies.analogy: Like water spreading through shortest available paths first
Building highway system connecting all cities through intermediate hubs
